title: Bumelia bellonis
taxonomy: Bumelia bellonis is classified within the family Sapotaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and phylogenetic relationships. The family Sapotaceae includes trees and shrubs commonly known as sapotes or soapberries. They are native to the Americas and are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Bumelia bellonis is a plant species native to the southeastern United States.
